coupon.source_phrase_block: This is a printable pass. You will receive the pass in your email or library staff can print it for you after you have made a reservation. Library ID: 14237 This coupon allows 50% off admission for 4 people to the New England Aquarium. Only applies to adult and child pricing. This is not a ticket. Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people.
